overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through a neon-lit urban district. The player moves through narrow alleys, past food vendors and vending machines, up stairs, and into open areas with massive holographic advertisements. The atmosphere is dense with cyberpunk aesthetics including cyan and magenta neon lights, futuristic architecture, and scattered pedestrians.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through a narrow alleyway lined with neon signs and graffiti-covered furniture

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in red pants walking away from camera down the alley

entered.detail: large cyan neon arrow sign with Japanese text pointing left
graffiti-covered concrete bench with trash can beside it
food preparation area with bright cyan neon lighting and red paper lanterns
small green plastic stool near the food stall entrance

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a narrow, neon-lit alleyway at night. The camera moves forward past a cyan neon arrow sign and a graffiti-covered concrete bench, approaching a food stall illuminated by bright cyan lights and traditional red lanterns. A single pedestrian in red pants walks ahead in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: food stall plaza with arcade machine

events.description: exiting narrow alley into slightly more open food stall area with standing NPCs

agents.ego_description: moving through a small plaza area with NPCs gathered near a food stall and arcade machine

notable_agents.action: woman in red and white outfit standing near the arcade machine
tall person in green coat with glowing accents standing beside the woman

entered.detail: retro-style arcade cabinet with illuminated screen and blue casing
traditional red Japanese paper lanterns hanging above the food stall

segments.scene_description: The scene opens up into a small plaza where several NPCs gather near a food stall and an arcade machine. The camera passes a woman in red and white standing by the arcade cabinet, while traditional red lanterns hang above the cyan-lit food stall in the background.

events.description: beginning to ascend concrete stairs to upper level

agents.ego_description: climbing a set of concrete stairs flanked by vending machines and graffiti-covered walls

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in white shirt and dark pants walking up the stairs ahead

entered.detail: wide concrete staircase leading upward with metal railings
pair of yellow and blue vending machines with illuminated product displays
wall covered in white graffiti tags and street art

segments.scene_description: The camera ascends a wide concrete staircase leading to an upper level, passing a pair of illuminated vending machines on the right and graffiti-covered walls on the left. A pedestrian walks up the stairs ahead as the environment transitions from the enclosed plaza to an elevated walkway.

scene_state.functional_zone: food vendor stall with display counter

events.description: reaching top of stairs and approaching food vendor counter
moving past vendor stall into more open area with city view

agents.ego_description: approaching a food vendor counter, observing the displayed food items, then moving past toward an open area

notable_agents.action: food vendor in white tank top working behind the counter, handling food items

entered.detail: glass display counter with plates of food including sandwiches and pastries under bright fluorescent lights
stainless steel cooking equipment with steam rising from the surface

segments.scene_description: At the top of the stairs, the camera approaches a food vendor stall with a glass display counter showcasing various food items under bright lights. A vendor works behind the counter as the camera moves past, transitioning from the sheltered stall area into a more open space with a view of the distant city skyline.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated city overlook with holographic advertisements

events.description: emerging from covered area into wide open space with panoramic city skyline view

agents.ego_description: walking along an elevated walkway with a stunning view of the neon-lit city skyline and massive holographic billboards

notable_agents.action: two pedestrians walking together along the overlook, one carrying a glowing blue object

entered.detail: massive floating holographic advertisements including a purple female figure and various corporate logos against the night sky
yellow and black kiosk with 'DELAMAIN' text and luxury car advertisement
dense futuristic skyscrapers with countless neon signs and lights
large green industrial dumpster with trash bags beside it

segments.scene_description: The scene dramatically opens up to reveal a breathtaking panoramic view of the city skyline. Massive holographic billboards float in the distance above dense clusters of neon-lit skyscrapers. The camera passes a yellow Delamain kiosk and walks along an elevated overlook where two pedestrians stroll together, one carrying a glowing blue item.

scene_state.functional_zone: city sidewalk with storefronts and railings

events.description: black car drives past on the street to the right

agents.ego_description: continuing down a city sidewalk past neon storefronts and street railings, approaching a crosswalk area

notable_agents.action: black sedan driving along the street parallel to the sidewalk

entered.detail: metal railings lining the edge of the sidewalk separating pedestrian and vehicle areas
building facades covered with bright neon signs including pink 'TENOU' signage
tall cylindrical pillar with multiple rotating holographic advertisements

segments.scene_description: The camera continues along a city sidewalk bordered by metal railings on the left and neon-covered storefronts on the right. A black sedan drives past on the street below as the camera approaches an intersection. The massive holographic billboards remain visible in the distance to the left while new neon signs and advertising pillars come into view ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a claustrophobic, neon-lit alleyway into an open urban plaza and finally up toward an elevated walkway. It begins by gliding through a narrow corridor past a cyan neon arrow and a graffiti-covered bench, approaching a food stall adorned with bright cyan lights and red lanterns. As the space expands, the camera enters a small plaza where pedestrians gather around an arcade machine and food vendors under the glow of hanging lanterns. The scene then shifts as the camera ascends a wide concrete staircase, passing illuminated vending machines and graffiti-strewn walls before reaching the upper level of the city.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sheltered urban nook into a sprawling, neon-drenched cityscape. It begins at the top of a staircase, gliding past a brightly lit food vendor stall and its glass display counter before emerging from the enclosure into a wide-open plaza. As the space expands, the view opens up to a breathtaking panoramic skyline dominated by massive floating holographic billboards and dense clusters of skyscrapers, passing a yellow Delamain kiosk and pedestrians on an elevated overlook. The scene then shifts toward a city sidewalk bordered by metal railings and neon storefronts, where a black sedan drives by on the street below. Finally, the camera approaches a busy intersection, keeping the distant holograms in sight while new advertising pillars and glowing signs come into view ahead.
